official_name: Forum of Incident Response and Security Teams
notes: FIRST coordinates incident response globally. Publishes CVSS (Common Vulnerability Scoring System) and EPSS (Exploit Prediction Scoring System), among other standards and best practices for incident response and security teams.

data.description: Industry standard for scoring the severity of security vulnerabilities. Provides Base, Temporal/Threat, and Environmental metric groups producing a score from 0.0 to 10.0.
data.notes:
CVSS v4.0 is the current version (released November 2023). CVSS v3.1 remains widely used across the industry. Each version has a specification document, user guide, and online calculator. CVSS is maintained by the CVSS Special Interest Group (SIG) within FIRST.

CVSS is a specification/standard, not a database of identifiers — it defines how to score vulnerabilities, not individual vulnerability records. Filed under reference because it is a document/specification that other systems reference.

versions_available.note: Current version. Adds Supplemental metric group, renames Temporal to Threat.
Still widely used. Minor revision of 3.0 with improved guidance.
Legacy. Still seen in older vulnerability databases.

urls.note: CVSS JSON and XML schema representations
